name: 回煞录 | Phantom Reckoning
publisher: 阿基米德 尼古拉斯 夏
short_description: Phantom Reckoning En este juego psicológico de terror chino en miniatura, encarnarás a una enfermera de un hospital rural en los años 90, atrapada en una pesadilla que se repite sin fin.
detailed_description:
▍Chinese Horror｜Authentic Rural Folktales

In 1990s rural China, without TV or internet, people gathered to share firsthand supernatural encounters. "Phantom Reckoning" brings these oral traditions to life, transporting you to that mysterious era.

▍Immersive Experience｜First-Person 90s Nightmare

The game uses first-person perspective to meticulously recreate 1990s environments - from peeling hospital walls to antiquated medical equipment. Based on real accounts, you'll experience bone-chilling moments firsthand.

▍Narrative-Driven Puzzles｜Truth Hidden in Folklore

With rich storytelling, each chapter presents different supernatural events like dream messages and ghost walls. To solve these, you must deeply understand the plot, analyze relationships, and utilize folk customs and special items.

▍Retro Art Style｜Blurred Yet Real Memories

The game features a unique visual style that preserves PS1-era angularity while adding modern lighting. Scenes resemble half-remembered nightmares of that old hospital - authentically rough yet unsettlingly real.

🎮 Controls

W / A / S / D: Move  Mouse: Look Around

Left Click: Interact / Dialogue / Use Held Item

Right Click: Submit item to NPC or place held item (make sure to choose a flat surface or a specific container, e.g., noodles go in the pot~)

W / S: Navigate dialogue options

D: Confirm selection

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Korean
